Leavanny

#0541 Swadloon #0543 Venipede
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Leavanny is a Bug/Grass type Pokémon introduced in Generation 5.

Leavanny

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0542
Type Bug Grass
Species Nurturing Pokémon
Height 1.2 m (3′11″)
Weight 20.5 kg (45.2 lbs)
Abilities 1. Swarm
2. Chlorophyll
Overcoat (hidden ability)
Local № 0048 (Black/White)
0019 (Black 2/White 2)
0015 (The Teal Mask)

Training

EV yield 3 Attack
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 225
Growth Rate Medium Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Bug
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 15 (3,599–3,855 steps)

Base stats

HP 75
260 354
Attack 103
189 335
Defense 80
148 284
Sp. Atk 70
130 262
Sp. Def 80
148 284
Speed 92
170 311
Total 500 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Type defenses

The effectiveness of each type on Leavanny.

NorFirWatEleGraIceFigPoiGro
4½½¼2½2¼
FlyPsyBugRocGhoDraDarSteFai
422

Evolution chart

#0540
Sewaddle
Bug · Grass
(Level 20)
#0541
Swadloon
Bug · Grass
(high Friendship)
#0542
Leavanny
Bug · Grass

Leavanny changes

  • In Generation 5, Leavanny has a base Special Defense of 70.
  • In Generation 5, Leavanny has a base experience yield of 221.
  • In Generations 5-7, Leavanny has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Black Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.
White It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.
Black 2
White 2		 Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.
X
Omega Ruby		 Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.

Moves learned by Leavanny

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Leavanny does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Leavanny cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Egg moves

Leavanny does not learn any moves by breeding in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet.

Answers to Leavanny questions

  • What is a good moveset for Leavanny?
  • Leavanny,scolipede,galvantula or escavalier?
  • Should replace my Escavalier with Accelgor,leavanny or any other grass or bug types or other suggestions in this team?
  • stat evolution explanation question
  • If I'm battling with a Jirachi against a Leavanny does the bug against pshycic still apply?
  • Leavanny or Scolipede?
  • Which Bug shall I use for Black-2 Playthrough?

nanny
